ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "depmap_id" TEXT /* DepMap ID for the cell line */,
  "arm_level_cna" INTEGER /* Arm-level CNAs for the cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "primary_disease" TEXT /* Primary disease associated with the cell line */,
  "lineage" TEXT /* Lineage of the cell line */,
  "one_lineage" TEXT /* One-line summary of the cell line's lineage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the cell line record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell line record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the cell line record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell line record was last updated */,
  "cell_line_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cell line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_primary_disease FOREIGN KEY ("primary_disease") REFERENCES primary_diseases ("primary_disease_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_lineage FOREIGN KEY ("lineage") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_diseases" (
  "primary_disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primary disease */,
  "primary_disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the primary disease */,
  "disease_category" TEXT /* Category of the primary disease */,
  "disease_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the primary disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primary_disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineages" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage */,
  "lineage_name" TEXT /* Name of the lineage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lineage */,
  "lineage_category" TEXT /* Category of the lineage */,
  "lineage_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the lineage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic mutation */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line with the mutation */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol for the mutation */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, deletion) */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation */,
  "mutation_consequence" TEXT /* Consequence of the mutation */,
  "mutation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the mutation on the cell line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_mutations_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line used in the experiment */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., gene expression, drug response) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, curator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line being evaluated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being evaluated (e.g., gene expression, drug response) */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "quality_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the quality metric */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality metric (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id")
)
